user_features.gender: Feminine-presenting casual style with soft androgynous streetwear elements.
user_features.skin_tone: Light skin tone with a warm-neutral palette; soft pastels and light denim appear harmonious.
user_features.hairstyle: Short tousled wavy bob in medium brown, with airy face-framing layers and a soft fringe effect.
user_features.body_type_characteristics: Slim, straight-to-soft rectangular presentation with relatively balanced shoulders and hips; the outfit creates a relaxed, low-structure silhouette with added lower-body volume from the wide-leg jeans.

current_outfit.style: Relaxed short-sleeve collared button-up shirt with a boxy fit and chest pocket, styled with oversized wide-leg jeans featuring decorative bow/tie strap details, creating a casual soft streetwear look.
current_outfit.color: Pale blush-pink shirt, light blue denim jeans, white sneakers, with a dark shoulder bag accent.
current_outfit.material: Lightweight woven cotton or cotton-blend shirt; soft washed denim jeans; smooth white sneaker material.

advantages: Soft pastel pink paired with light-wash denim creates a gentle, cohesive palette that suits the light warm-neutral complexion.
The relaxed short-sleeve shirt and wide-leg jeans form an intentionally casual, youthful silhouette with good balance between the upper and lower body.
areas_for_improvement: The boxy shirt hem ends around the hip area and can visually shorten the torso; a slight tuck or cropped styling would sharpen the proportions.
The jeans have strong volume and tie details, so pairing them with a more fitted or structured top could create clearer shape definition.
